introduction.title: Hello, I'm
introduction.description: Software Engineering student at the University of Brasília (UnB) and full-stack programming enthusiast.

about.title: About me
about.paragraph_1: I'm a Full-Stack Developer currently based in Brasília, Brazil, where I study Software Engineering at UnB. I build solutions for Web and Mobile, and I also have experience in areas such as Systems Architecture, Software Requirements, IoT, and AI integration.
about.paragraph_2: My journey is shaped by flexibility and curiosity. I believe good engineering goes beyond code: it is about solving real problems. I'm always open to new connections and opportunities, so feel free to get in touch!
about.description: My name is Danielle Soares and I am a Software Engineering student at the University of Brasília (UnB). Passionate about software development, I have explored areas such as web and mobile development. As an avid student, I am always looking for opportunities to improve my knowledge and explore new areas and technologies.

skill_1.title: Continuous learning
skill_1.description: With constant technological advancement, I value continuous study, not only to learn new tools, but also to improve acquired skills.

skill_2.title: Organization
skill_2.description: A well-structured system is, without a doubt, more efficient. Therefore, I prioritize planning and organization during all stages of development.

skill_3.title: Flexibility
skill_3.description: I am prepared to deal with changes and new challenges. Whether on the front-end or back-end, I am able to adapt to the needs of each project.

skill_4.title: Cooperativity
skill_4.description: Cooperativeness and communication are essential for collaborative work. I believe that teamwork promotes mutual growth.

exp_1.company: Center for Studies, Development, and Innovation in Software
exp_1.description: Development of corporate Generative AI systems. Focused on LLM orchestration, dynamic model selection, and fine-tuning strategies. Implemented containerization for application scalability.
exp_1.highlight: Focused on model specialization for corporate contexts.

exp_2.description: Created a Flutter app for IMU sensor data acquisition and analysis via Bluetooth Classic (ESP32). The system enables real-time monitoring of gait and Body Center of Mass trajectory for physical therapy.
exp_2.highlight: Data export in .csv for clinical studies.

exp_3.description: Developed a mobile interface for triggering tricycles via functional electrical stimulation (FES). Integrated assisted cycling with Virtual Reality for spinal cord injury rehabilitation.
exp_3.highlight: Assistive technology focused on mobility and inclusion.

exp_4.description: Directly assisting students in learning OOP paradigms, design patterns, and advanced logic. Clarifying technical doubts and supporting programming labs.
exp_4.highlight: Focus on clean code and software architecture.

exp_5.description: Conceived and developed an accessibility solution for deaf students in an electronics technical course. Created academic materials in Libras and a UI focused on the deaf user experience.
exp_5.highlight: Award-winning project focused on social impact and inclusion.

project_2.title: Random Colors
project_2.description: Create a random color palette with just one click.

project_3.title: Eletro Libras
project_3.description: The Eletro Libras app aims to include deaf students in the Electronics course through Libras.

description.pt2: Feel free to send me a message.

skills.title: Toolbox
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I master to deliver quality solutions.
